info.name: My Hangul Name API
info.description: Free, CORS-enabled API to convert any name from 19 languages into its closest natural Korean (Hangul) spelling, with pronunciation (IPA) and origin. No API key required. Docs: https://www.myhangulname.com/api-docs

query.description: Name in any language (required, max 60 chars)
UI language for text fields (optional, default en)

request.description: Returns the closest Korean (Hangul) spelling(s) for a name, with IPA and origin.
Same as GET, with the name in a JSON body.
